//: Add this to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (merge into the existing objects).
//1: The URL is the proxy host reachable from the VM (use the host-mapped port). Keep the port private to the VM<->host network; never expose it publicly.
//2: GMAIL_PROXY_TOKEN is the per-agent bearer token issued from the proxy admin UI; store it as an OpenClaw secret, not in plaintext.
//3: The proxy serves plain HTTP. For https, front it with a TLS-terminating reverse proxy, then use an https:// URL plus sslVerify/mTLS.
//4: If the agent gets 421 'Invalid Host header', set 'MCP allowed hosts' on the proxy's admin Configuration page to the host it connects with (any host is allowed by default).

tools.//: Defense in depth: restrict this agent to only the proxy's tools. The proxy is the real enforcer.
